name: EUR/USD

analysis: EUR/USD is leaning down on the 4-hour, 67% conviction. The Daily bias agrees. Volatility is quiet — coiled and choppy. Nearest structure: ceiling (16.0 pips away). A soft dollar (-0.06% DXY) is a headwind to the read.
